title: Aqueous Two-Phase System (ATPS): Overview and Advances in Applications
author: Iqbal, Tao, et al.

steps.title: Analysis of model
steps.instruction: After the optimization of significant factors in the previous step the quadratic equation obtained has to be solved analytically to determine the optimum values. Statistical software, for example Minitab®, Design-Expert® and Matlab®, which are being used in many fields for different applications [52–56], can also be used for this purpose. This analysis provides the optimum level of significant factors which maximize the response of model [26, 44, 45].
